title: AutoChunkLoader
description: A simple plugin that loads chunks around long railways and redstone signals
body: A simple plugin that loads chunks around long railways and redstone signals It can be used for transporting resources in chest minecarts through whole world or making large redstone circuits. ### Keep in mind with incorrect use this plugin can negatively affect server performance! Installation: - Download jar file - Put this file into `/plugins` folder of your Spigot server - Restart server - Modify `/plugins/AutoChunkLoader/config.yml` file for your needs ![stats](https://bstats.org/signatures/bukkit/AutoChunkLoader.svg)
